name: Esau's World
short_description: Esau's World is the puzzle game about controlling two people at once. Plan what Esau will do beforehand then synchronize your actions to clear puzzles! Crash into the magical world of your brother Esau, where he's a god... a fallen god. Free Esau from his inner demons, and break out of Esau's World!
detailed_description:
Esau's World is the puzzle game about controlling two people at once. Play as Jake, barging into the magical world of his brother Esau, daring to rekindle their broken relationship. In this world, Esau is omnipotent. But omnipotence isn't always a good thing. Free Esau from the chains of his inner demons, rebuild a shattered relationship, and break free from Esau's World!

  • Plan alongside your brother through team-based puzzles in single-player mode! Set beforehand what Esau will do and then act in tandem to overcome any challenge!

  • Meet colorful creations of Esau's imagination to uncover the secrets Esau keeps in the dark

  • Gather new mechanics into a crescendo of concepts! The complexity grows as you rely on all of them together!

  • Complete optional challenges and special puzzle rooms hidden under every bush!

  • Escape the demons writhing in the shadows of Esau's soul

  • Save him.

Esau is the master of a magical book conjuring his own little world. Writing in the book allows him to make anything. Esau is not just some visitor to this world, he is GOD. Today, he has retreated into his fantasy land. And why wouldn't he? He is king there.

Sometimes Esau will be enthusiastic. Sometimes he'll be so depressed all he can do is walk. You must push through the hard times, in the hope that you'll break through to the person and find blue skies of forgiveness at the end.

Esau's World is my first ever published game, which I started work on in 2022! Thank you so much for your support! It means the world to me!
